subcodes.first_line: O servant! Burn away thy hopes with the fire of the love of thy Lord, the All-Possessing, the Most Exalted, and ponder thereafter upon wealth likewise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا عبد ان احرق الامال بنار حب ربک الغنی المتعال ثم فکر فی المال کذلک
subcodes.subjects: @thankfulness; gratitude, @spiritual transformation, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @love as fire
